title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Housing.com - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Housing.com - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Housing.com in Madurai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Housing.com:
Housing.com is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com!
